title: 5 OLT User Management
body_text:
5	OLT User Management
5.1	OLT User Types
OLT users must be set up as a Client Centre User or a CPS Admin Security Officer. There are two types of OLT users at the financial institution level: Tracers and SuperTracers. The following permissions are associated with each user type:
Permission
Tracer
SuperTracer
View trace requests
芒聴聫
芒聴聫
Create trace requests
芒聴聫
芒聴聫
Update email notification setting
芒聴聫
芒聴聫
View daily OLT reports
芒聴聫
芒聴聫
Authorize trace requests
芒聴聫
Submit trace requests to Central聽1
芒聴聫
Delete or modify unauthorized traces
芒聴聫
5.2	Creating Tracers and SuperTracers
The OLT user type is defined in the individual芒聙聶s Client Centre user profile. See the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on adding, modifying, and deleting Client Centre Users and CPS Admin Security Officers. If your financial institution is on User Management, see the User Management Part for procedures.
Creating an OLT Tracer or SuperTracer Who is a Client Centre User
A CPS Admin Security Officer proceeds as follows to create an OLT Tracer or SuperTracer in CPS Admin if the individual is a Client Centre User:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	You芒聙聶ll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if it芒聙聶s your first login to the Client Centre, you芒聙聶ve deleted your cookies, or you芒聙聶re using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
CPS Admin
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If you芒聙聶ve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under 芒聙聹My Favourites芒聙聺.
Figure 3: Accessing CPS Admin
Select the
Click here
link. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: CPS Administration Access
Select
Edit User
if the individual is already set up as a Client Centre User.
Select
Add User
if the individual isn芒聙聶t yet set up as a Client Centre User.
Scroll down to the Applications Menu and select the check box beside 芒聙聹OLT芒聙聺. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Assigning OLT Access
Enter the individual芒聙聶s 8-digit transit number in the Transit Number field (e.g., 80912010).
Type 芒聙聹Tracer芒聙聺 or 芒聙聹SuperTracer芒聙聺 in the Role type field. The information entered in this field is case sensitive.
Select
Submit
at the bottom of the page.
Ask another CPS Admin Security Officer to authorize the change.
Creating an OLT Tracer or SuperTracer Who Is Currently a CPS Admin Security Officer
Proceed as follows to create a Tracer or SuperTracer if the individual is already a CPS Admin Security Officer:
Complete the CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035, as described in the CPS Admin Application Part. See Figure 6.
芒聭
Record 芒聙聹OLT芒聙聺 in this section if the individual is permitted to access OLT.
芒聢聮
Record the individual芒聙聶s home transit number (e.g., 80912010).
芒聢聮
Record 芒聙聹Tracer芒聙聺 or 芒聙聹SuperTracer芒聙聺 to indicate the OLT user type.
芒聭隆
Record 芒聙聹OLT芒聙聺 in this section if the individual is permitted to assign OLT access to Client Centre Users.
芒聭垄
Ensure that the form is signed by two signing officers on file with your central credit union.
Figure 6: CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035
Forward the form to your central credit union as indicated on page 2. If applicable, the central credit union will authorize the form and forward it to Central聽1.
Creating an OLT Tracer or SuperTracer Who Is a New CPS Admin Security Officer
Proceed as follows to create a Tracer or SuperTracer if the individual is a new CPS Admin Security Officer:
Complete the CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918, as described in the CPS Admin Application Part. See Figure 7.
芒聭
Record 芒聙聹OLT芒聙聺 in this section if the individual is permitted access to OLT.
芒聢聮
Record the individual芒聙聶s home transit number (e.g., 80912010).
芒聢聮
Record 芒聙聹Tracer芒聙聺 or 芒聙聹SuperTracer芒聙聺 to indicate the OLT user type.
芒聭隆
Record 芒聙聹OLT芒聙聺 in this section if the individual is permitted to assign OLT access to Client Centre Users.
芒聭垄
Ensure that the form is signed by two signing officers on file with your central credit union.
Figure 7: CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918
Forward the form to your central credit union as indicated on page 2. If applicable, the central credit union will authorize the form and forward it to Central聽1.
Central聽1 will communicate a unique one-time password to new CPS Admin Security Officers. The CPS Admin Security Officer can refer to the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on registering passwords and fingerprints on CPS Admin.
Related Information

Form 1918
CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request,
Form 2035
5.3	Modifying Tracers and SuperTracers
The user type and transit number can be modified for existing OLT users. See the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on modifying other aspects of the individual芒聙聶s Client Centre user profile. Alternatively, if your financial institution is using User Management, see the User Management Part for procedures.
Modifying OLT Tracers or SuperTracers Who Are Client Centre Users
A CPS Admin Security Officer proceeds as follows in CPS Admin to modify an OLT Tracer or SuperTracer who is a Client Centre User:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 8.
Note: 	You芒聙聶ll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if it芒聙聶s your first login to the Client Centre, you芒聙聶ve deleted your cookies, or you芒聙聶re using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 8: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 9.
Figure 9: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
CPS Admin
. See Figure 10.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If you芒聙聶ve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under 芒聙聹My Favourites芒聙聺.
Figure 10: Accessing CPS Admin
Select the
Click Here
link. See Figure 11.
Figure 11: CPS Administration Access
Select
Edit User
and open the Client Centre User芒聙聶s profile. See the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on locating and modifying Client Centre Users.
Update the Client Centre User芒聙聶s profile as required (e.g., update the transit number or user type). See Figure 12.
Figure 12: Modifying OLT Access
Select
Submit
at the bottom of the page.
Ask another CPS Admin Security Officer to authorize the change.
Modifying OLT Tracers or SuperTracers Who Are CPS Admin Security Officers
Proceed as follows to modify an OLT Tracer or SuperTracer who is a CPS Admin Security Officer:
Complete the CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035, as described in the CPS Admin Application Part. See Figure 13.
芒聭
Record the changes to the individual芒聙聶s home transit number or OLT user type in this section.
芒聭隆
Ensure that the form is signed by two signing officers on file with your central credit union.
Figure 13: CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035
Forward the form to your central credit union as indicated on page 2. If applicable, the central credit union will authorize the form and forward it to Central聽1.
5.4	Deleting Tracers and SuperTracers
Deleting OLT Tracers or SuperTracers Who Are Client Centre Users
A CPS Admin Security Officer proceeds as follows in CPS Admin to delete access to OLT for a Tracer or SuperTracer who is a Client Centre User:
Note:	If your financial institution is using User Management, see the User Management Part for procedures on deleting a user芒聙聶s access to OLT.
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 14.
Note: 	You芒聙聶ll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if it芒聙聶s your first login to the Client Centre, you芒聙聶ve deleted your cookies, or you芒聙聶re using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 14: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 15.
Figure 15: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
CPS Admin
. See Figure 16.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If you芒聙聶ve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under 芒聙聹My Favourites芒聙聺.
Figure 16: Accessing CPS Admin
Select the
Click Here
link. See Figure 17.
Figure 17: CPS Administration Access
Select
Edit User
and open the Client Centre User芒聙聶s profile. See the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on locating and modifying Client Centre Users.
Select the checkbox beside 芒聙聹OLT芒聙聺
to remove the checkmark. This deletes access to OLT. See Figure 18.
Note:	If the individual no longer requires access to the Client Centre in any capacity, delete the Client Centre User as described in the CPS Admin Application Part.
Figure 18: Deleting OLT Access
Ask another CPS Admin Security Officer to authorize the change.
Deleting OLT Tracers or SuperTracers Who Are CPS Admin Security Officers
Proceed as follows to delete an OLT Tracer or SuperTracer who is a CPS Admin Security Officer:
Complete the CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035, as described in the CPS Admin Application Part. See Figure 19.
芒聭
If the individual no longer requires access to CPS Admin in any capacity, select
Delete Security Officer
.
芒聭隆
To delete the individual芒聙聶s personal access to OLT, record 芒聙聹Delete OLT Tracer芒聙聺 or 芒聙聹Delete OLT SuperTracer芒聙聺 in this section.
芒聭垄
To delete the individual芒聙聶s right to assign OLT access to Client Centre Users, record 芒聙聹Delete CPS Admin Rights to OLT芒聙聺 in this section.
芒聭拢
Ensure that the form is signed by two signing officers on file with your central credit union.
Figure 19: CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035
Forward the form to your central credit union as indicated on page 2. If applicable, the central credit union will authorize the form and forward it to Central聽1.
END
